message:
test(P2.11): Codex allow-once round-trip — deny→extract code→redeem→retry passes

Tests the full allow-once lifecycle under Codex protocol:
- Codex deny creates pending exception with short_code in pending_exceptions.jsonl
- Extract short_code from the JSONL store (not stderr, since non-rich-output
  build doesn't render allow-once code in the denial box)
- Redeem via `dcg allow-once <code> --yes`
- Retry same command under Codex — now exits 0 (allowed)

Also tests that pending exception store is populated after Codex deny
(validates that process::exit(2) doesn't skip the store.record_block call).

All 56 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
